minimum_runtime_change_set: Declare a machine-readable gate contract for every gate-bearing card or wait.
Attach the active gate contract to card envelopes and await_role_decision actions.
Keep unsupported/general events non-completing for gate waits.
Treat a gate group as complete only when a terminal gate outcome satisfies the active gate flag.
Map gate-targeted PM role-work results to a concrete gate pass/block event before continuation.
Use product behavior model submission as the only Product Officer gate completion path.
Write only the canonical product behavior model artifact for new runs.
Require PM product behavior model acceptance before reviewer challenge or route planning can use the model.
Use process route model submission as the only Process Officer route gate completion path.
Write only the canonical process route model artifact for new runs.
Require PM process route model acceptance before Reviewer route challenge can use the model.
